title: podandria macrandra
side_effects: Podandria macrandra can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea and vomiting, which can be caused by ingesting the plant's toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Podandria macrandra can lead to cardiac problems, including irregular heartbeat and palpitations. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic properties can cause damage to the liver and kidneys, impairing their function and increasing the risk of disease. If not handled and used correctly, Podandria macrandra can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems in some individuals.
